task.summary: Object created to get any available waveform
Threading, synth and camera playability added
Handedness detectable, playability with one synth per hand
Wave.py bug fix v2 (hopefully the last)
Optimized finger functionality, created WaveGroup class
Volume changing implemented, stereo audio added, notes adjusted to justly intonated C4 Major scale
Octaves with thumbs implemented, readme file created, scale and key customizability created

MESSAGE.value: Object created to get any available waveform
Threading, synth and camera playability added
Handedness detectable, playability with one synth per hand
Wave.py bug fix v2 (hopefully the last)
Optimized finger functionality, created WaveGroup class
Volume changing implemented, stereo audio added, notes adjusted to justly intonated C4 Major scale
Octaves with thumbs implemented, readme file created, scale and key customizability created
